notes: Lesson 3 Part 2 (act 18, 'Shortage and surplus push price back', 287.98s, 14 cues rescaled to real MP3). Dynamics/convergence focus using econ.py gap_marker + push_arrow on the shared linear market. Two iterations: round-1 authored+rendered all 14; round-2 fixed Cue10 (wide verdict overlapped the Quantity axis label -> compact '→ shortage' in the clear left wedge) and Cue12 (question text sat on the x-axis -> moved to the top band and shifted right to clear the Price label). Per-cue checklist (formula legibility+correctness, highlighted element matches narration, contrast, nothing off-frame/overlapping via theme.guard, chunk timing) all pass. Chunk timing verified in render log; final 288.0s vs audio 287.98s Δ0.02s (<0.5s).
